title: Tangy Fluffy Cod Stir-fry
description: A festive Australian dish featuring cod in a tangy and fluffy sauce, perfect for a light lunch or dinner that's keto-friendly.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Season the cod fillets with salt and black pepper.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Add olive oil, cook until it starts smoking lightly.
Add minced garlic and onions to the hot pan for about 2 minutes or until fragrant but not browned.
Pour in lemon juice and white wine vinegar. Stir well to combine all ingredients, scraping the bottom of the pan to remove any brown bits.
Place cod fillets on top of the sauce mixture. Cover with a lid and bake in the oven for 15 minutes or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
Remove from the oven and serve hot.
